title: Frost Wyrms sets equipped creature SPD and modifier to zero

card.rawText: The equipped creature's SPD and base Modifier are changed to 0. The equipped creature cannot be used as a sacrifice.

effect.value: The equipped creature's SPD and base Modifier are changed to 0. The equipped creature cannot be used as a sacrifice.

plan.title: Frost Wyrms sets equipped creature SPD and modifier to zero

manualVerification: The equipped creature also cannot be used as a sacrifice while Frost Wyrms remains equipped.
